pi_items.source: Google Play Store (https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.robert.fcView), APKPure, and multiple APK distribution sites confirm this package name
Official app name on Google Play Store, APKPure, Aptoide, AppBrain, and official website (https://flightcrewview.com/)

privileged_info_summary: Flight Crew View (package: com.robert.fcView) is a real Android app available on Google Play Store and APKPure. The app is used by over 40,000 crews and is developed by Robert T Murray. Latest version is 3.9.5 (as of February 2026). The app provides flight information, schedule management, and compliance tools for pilots and flight attendants. The task uses real, publicly-available app data.
